pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly query for 'technical infrastructure cab'
setup_task.sh synthetically seeds these users via API, matching task description instructions
Task description exact text ('reviewing and approving all high-impact network and server infrastructure changes.') and verifier logic

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new Change Advisory Board (CAB) from scratch. Verified the expected CAB name 'Technical Infrastructure CAB' and required description keywords ('reviewing', 'approving', 'infrastructure') explicitly match the instructions provided in the prompt and the database queries in export_result.sh. Confirmed that the target members 'David Chen' and 'Sarah Miller' are synthetically seeded into the environment via setup_task.sh.
